level1.name: angstrom.n.01
level1.definition: a metric unit of length equal to one ten billionth of a meter (or 0.0001 micron); used to specify wavelengths of electromagnetic radiation

level1.name: different.a.01
level1.definition: unlike in nature or quality or form or degree

level1.name: acquisition.n.01
level1.definition: the act of contracting or assuming or acquiring possession of something

level1.name: structure.n.01
level1.definition: a thing constructed; a complex entity constructed of many parts

level1.name: precise.a.01
level1.definition: sharply exact or accurate or delimited

level1.name: vitamin_d.n.01
level1.definition: a fat-soluble vitamin that prevents rickets

level1.name: inch.n.01
level1.definition: a unit of length equal to one twelfth of a foot

level1.name: be.v.01
level1.definition: have the quality of being; (copula, used with an adjective or a predicate noun)

level2.name: metric_linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a linear unit of distance in metric terms

level2.name: artifact.n.01
level2.definition: a man-made object taken as a whole

level2.name: fat-soluble_vitamin.n.01
level2.definition: any vitamin that is soluble in fats

level2.name: written_record.n.01
level2.definition: a written document preserving knowledge of facts or events

level2.name: linear_unit.n.01
level2.definition: a unit of measurement of length

level3.name: metric_unit.n.01
level3.definition: a decimal unit of measurement of the metric system (based on meters and kilograms and seconds)

level3.name: whole.n.02
level3.definition: an assemblage of parts that is regarded as a single entity

level3.name: vitamin.n.01
level3.definition: any of a group of organic substances essential in small quantities to normal metabolism

level3.name: record.n.01
level3.definition: anything (such as a document or a phonograph record or a photograph) providing permanent evidence of or information about past events

level3.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level3.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level4.name: unit_of_measurement.n.01
level4.definition: any division of quantity accepted as a standard of measurement or exchange

level4.name: nutriment.n.01
level4.definition: a source of materials to nourish the body

level4.name: evidence.n.02
level4.definition: an indication that makes something evident

level4.name: change.v.01
level4.definition: cause to change; make different; cause a transformation
